title: Wintermute Is Providing Liquidity on Kalshi and Polymarket, Linking Two Giants
summary: Wintermute is providing liquidity on the two biggest prediction markets—Kalshi and Polymarket—linking flows for both firms, according to a source familiar with the matter. The move aims to improve trading efficiency and liquidity for users on both platforms. The exact terms of the arrangement were not disclosed.
body:
Wintermute, a prominent liquidity provider in the crypto space, is now providing liquidity on Kalshi and Polymarket, two of the largest prediction markets, linking flows for both firms, according to a source familiar with the matter. This initiative is designed to enhance trading experiences by connecting the liquidity of both platforms, allowing for smoother and more efficient trades.

Kalshi and Polymarket are two of the largest prediction markets, offering users the ability to bet on the outcomes of various events, from political elections to sports results. By providing liquidity on both platforms, Wintermute aims to create a more interconnected and liquid market environment. This collaboration is expected to benefit traders by reducing slippage and improving price discovery, ultimately making it easier for users to execute trades at favorable rates.

For everyday users, this development means better access to prediction markets and potentially lower costs when trading. With improved liquidity, traders can expect tighter spreads and more competitive pricing, making it more attractive to participate in these markets. This move also highlights the growing importance of liquidity providers in the prediction market space, as they play a crucial role in ensuring market efficiency and stability.

While the exact details of the arrangement between Wintermute, Kalshi, and Polymarket have not been disclosed, the collaboration is a significant step toward a more integrated prediction market ecosystem. Users should watch for any official announcements or updates from the involved parties, as these could provide more insights into the scope and benefits of this partnership. Traders interested in prediction markets may want to explore both platforms to take advantage of the improved liquidity and trading conditions.
